case_description:
TEAMS:
  - Team A has a team salary of $179,000,000;
  - Team B has a team salary of $120,000,000.

PLAYERS:
  - Player A was the 3rd first-round pick of Team A in 2016 NBA draft when he was 18 years old.
  - Player A signed a 4-year contract (annual salary $36,000,000, 5% increase per year) with Team A during 2023 Moratorium Period.
  - Player B was the 15th first-round pick of Team B in 2014 NBA draft when he was 20 years old.
  - Player B signed a 4-year contract (annual salary $34,300,000, 5% increase per year) with Team B during 2022 Moratorium Period.

OPERATION UNDER ADJUDICATION: A
  A. Team A trades Player A for Player B.
